name: Turkey Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chopped chives, parsley or curry powder
1 Red apple with skins, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 Green apple with skins, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. To make salad dressing, combine preserves, yogurt, lemon juice, chives, mustard, lemon zest, salt and pepper in a bowl; set aside.
2. Place turkey in a glass pie plate. Add water and cover with vented plastic wrap. Microwave on medium-high (70 percent) 6-8 minutes, or until juices run clear.
3. When cool enough to handle, cut the turkey into 1/2-inch cubes and place in a large mixing bowl. Add apples, celery, and raisins; toss with salad dressing.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves garnished with chopped chives or chopped parsley.
